items.t: Wall Street Week | SpaceX Goes Public, Google’s AI Bet, World Cup Price Backlash
items.d: This week, the arrival of mega-IPOs is testing capital markets as investor appetite grows larger than supply. The federal government is making a direct investment in private technology companies, betting on quantum computing. Plus, Google is making its most radical change to search in twenty years by incorporating AI. Later, the most lucrative World Cup in history is testing how much fans are will
